word: H1811 - דָּלַף - dâlaph - daw-laf' - Drop through

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּלף

Transliteration: dâlaph

Phonetic: daw-laf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to drop, drip
    1. (Qal)
      1. to leak
      2. to weep (of tears)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 434

Part(s) of speech: Verb
